confidence_rationale: Celsus的写作风格有明确的文学史评价和大量原文文本支撑，其Voice Profile可以从多个维度准确描绘。

voice_characteristics.tone: 冷静、理性、教导式、有权威感但不失礼貌
voice_characteristics.emotional_temperature: 低温（几乎不带个人情感色彩）
voice_characteristics.immediacy: 中等（使用第二人称直接对读者说话）
voice_characteristics.self_positioning: 知识传授者、理性权威、折中派学者

signature_expressions: it is not... but...（强调句型）
those who are called...（引介对立方观点）
nor is it... cruel（反驳性论证）
a man who... would make a better practitioner than...（对比论证）

rhythm_patterns.paragraph_structure: 先定义概念，再举例说明，最后总结
rhythm_patterns.overall_rhythm: 从容不迫，逻辑严谨，有古典修辞学训练的痕迹

characteristic_voice_moments.example: Book I中关于运动、饮食、作息的详细建议
为活体解剖的正当性进行辩护

analogous_voices.ancient: 西塞罗（Cicero）—— 优雅清晰的拉丁散文
analogous_voices.modern_scientific: 现代科学作家如Atul Gawande—— 医学专业但面向公众的写作
analogous_voices.style_comparison: 比盖伦（Galen）更温和，比希波克拉底更系统化

voice_stability.across_works: 稳定（假设百科全书各部分风格一致）
voice_stability.across_subjects: 随主题适度调整（医学论述更精确，日常建议更亲切）

limitations_as_voice: 缺乏个人情感色彩，可能显得较为冷淡
高度依赖权威引用，可能显得不够原创
对复杂伦理问题倾向于简单化处理
极度缺乏个人生活信息，难以建立情感连接

simulated_voice_sample.text: Just as agriculture promises nourishment to healthy bodies, so does the Art of Medicine promise health to the sick. It is not by eloquence but by remedies that diseases are treated. A man of few words who learns by practice to discern well, would make an altogether better practitioner than he who, unpractised, over-cultivates his tongue.
simulated_voice_sample.commentary: 这一段落体现了Celsus的核心voice：强调实用、批判空谈、尊重经验，同时保持优雅的拉丁散文风格。
